title: Escrow and Arbitration
description: Escrow and arbitration uses a 2-of-3 multisig contract where buyer, seller, and arbitrator can resolve payment outcomes without trusting one party alone. It shows how P2SH multisig can encode conditional dispute resolution directly in Bitcoin spending paths.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Contracts
resources.notes: Canonical walkthrough of the 2-of-3 escrow contract pattern and its buyer, seller, and arbitrator resolution paths.

resources.title: BIP 16: Pay to Script Hash
resources.notes: Canonical background for why the multisig redeem script can be hidden until spend time.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Script-level reference for multisig spending paths, redeem scripts, and legacy contract construction patterns.
